90 AB10B AB10B_MR_DD_DOWNS (AB10B) Downs Syndrome CHAR 1 Demographic information: conditions related to MR/DD status - Down's Syndrome. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
91 AB10C AB10C_MR_DD_AUTISM (AB10C) Autism CHAR 1 Demographic information: conditions related to MR/DD status - autism. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
